title: Unobtrusive Fog
description: Adds Selective and Toggleable Unobtrusive Fog
body:
<center>

Is **vanilla fog** so thick you can't see anything, but **disabling it** causes ugly terrain cutoffs? \
Then this mod is for you!

This mod adds unobtrusive fog that lets you see farther while still maintaining a natural look.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uFbNzZcD/images/c7b1cd926138729444128861623bbf58d821c450.png) \
Requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).

</center>
